cards.title: Balancing Work and Childcare This Summer
cards.body: With holiday childcare costs rising, many parents struggle to juggle work and school-aged children during summer breaks. The Guardian is gathering real experiences from parents managing this annual challenge.

cards.title: IVF Journey and Surrogacy Experience
cards.body: Narzny McKinney shares her experience using a surrogate after eight rounds of IVF failed. She and her surrogate discuss the emotional journey and misconceptions surrounding surrogacy.

cards.title: UK Surrogacy Law Under Pressure
cards.body: Experts warn that outdated surrogacy legislation is forcing intended parents toward riskier arrangements abroad. The demand for surrogacy is rising sharply as current UK law struggles to keep pace.

cards.title: Talking to Kids About Money After Divorce
cards.body: Family law attorneys and divorced parents offer guidance on discussing finances with children post-separation. Open conversations about money can ease household tension and build financial stability.

cards.title: Why Losing a Child Shatters Everything
cards.body: The death of a child wounds six core psychological needs simultaneously, creating profound trauma. Healing involves preserving grief while slowly rebuilding safety, agency, and meaning.

cards.title: When Adult Children Blame Their Parents
cards.body: Hearing "you ruined my life" from an adult child can feel jarring and devastating. How you respond to this blame determines whether the relationship heals or deteriorates further.

cards.title: Building Support Without Family Connections
cards.body: Family estrangement creates quiet, hard moments many people aren't prepared to face alone. Five practical strategies can help you build the emotional support system you're missing.

cards.title: Emotionally Healthy Dating After Divorce
cards.body: Moving on from divorce requires self-awareness and emotional maturity, not just waiting time. Choosing new relationships from growth rather than fear leads to healthier partnerships.

cards.title: Why Someone Else's Anxiety Affects You
cards.body: When loved ones feel anxious, we often absorb their stress unconsciously. Anxiety therapy helps untangle these reactions and teaches you to stay grounded in yourself.

cards.title: Heatwave Anxiety and Mental Health
cards.body: Extreme heat can significantly impact mental health, with young people and women most vulnerable. Managing heatwave anxiety requires practical coping strategies during stressful weather conditions.

cards.title: Teen Masculinity Crisis and Reading Culture
cards.body: Children's laureate Patrice Lawrence, author of the bestselling novel Orangeboy, addresses the crisis of teenage masculinity and declining reading rates among young men. His work tackles issues resonating with modern youth.
